title: Ja'Gatcha
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:JaGatcha-KOTOR.jpg]] |name=Ja'Gatcha |homeworld=[[Sorjus]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Paaerduag]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |skin=Green {{C|main body}}; mottled brown {{C|secondary body}} |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|What you want, human? You come to stare like others here on Taris? You think we are strange?|Ja'Gatcha, to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|translated=1|}} '''Ja'Gatcha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Paaerduag]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] known in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]] as "[[Sorjus]]." The joined being left his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] to travel [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. During these travels Ja-Gatcha became stranded on the world of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] after the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Malak]]'s [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Empire]] [[Attack on the Endar Spire|attacked]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|cruiser]] ''[[Endar Spire]]'' and then initiated a planet-wide [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] in an attempt to capture the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Bastila Shan]]. While stuck on Taris, Ja'Gatcha visited [[Javyar's Cantina]] located in the [[Lower City]], where he would field questions and avoid mockery. ==Biography== {{Quote|Now we are stuck here on a world that hates non-humans… not a good place to be.|translated=1|Ja'Gatcha laments their predicament during the Sith blockade|}} Ja'Gatcha, a [[Paaerduag]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] known as [[Sorjus]] in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Originally the being began life as two separate individuals. However, like all other members of their [[Species/Legends|species]] these two eventually become one. The combined being left the planet and traveled about [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] some time before [[3956 BBY]].''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' On one such trip he stopped on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] to pick up supplies. During this time, forces belonging to the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Malak]]'s [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] [[Attack on the Endar Spire|attacked]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Endar Spire]]'' over Taris in an attempt to capture the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Bastila Shan]]. Once the cruiser was destroyed, a [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] was raised and the planet was quarantined, forcing Ja'Gatcha to remain on the planet. Deciding to hide out in [[Javyar's Cantina]] in order to avoid the [[Upper City]]'s anti-[[Alien/Legends|alien]] laws, Ja'Gatcha stayed put and attempted to deflect mockery. {{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic}} The Republic [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]][[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] {{C|Entry from [[Deesra Luur Jada]]'s [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]]}}In ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', [[Revan/Legends|Revan's]] position in the [[Republic Army]] is revealed in the second conversation with [[Carth Onasi]] regarding his background. [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] met Ja'Gatcha in the cantina sometime after the former's crash on Taris. The Paaerduag, pleased that Revan did not intend to look down on him, revealed a few facts about his life, species, homeworld, and predicament. {{Endgame}} ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|We am the pinnacle of evolution!|translated=1|Ja'Gatcha|}} Ja'Gatcha felt that his [[Species/Legends|species]] was the "pinnacle of evolution" and as such looked down on other, "lesser" species. However, not all individuals shared their outlook, and as such would fling insults at the Paaerduag. Due to this Ja'Gatcha possessed an edgy and paranoid personality. However, once an individual revealed that his intentions were not hostile or mocking, Ja'Gatcha would open up and answer some questions, though he refrained from speaking of his home planet due to missing his home and not being able to return. Ja'Gatcha had [[Color/Legends|black]] eyes and green skin on the main portion of his body. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|You're a freak!''"
"''No, human – you are the freak! One tiny brain, two eyes that only see in one direction.|Revan and Ja'Gatcha taunting each other|}} Ja'Gatcha's first and only appearance was as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. There, the player character could interact with him. However, the nature of the conversation was such that it did not progress any plot lines, nor did it change the player character's alignment, and therefore it is undetermined whether Revan ever interacted with the Paaerduag or whether or not he insulted Ja'Gatcha or sympathized with him. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Ja'Gatcha |es=Ja'Gatcha |nl=Ja'Gatcha |pl=Ja'Gatcha }} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Paaerduags]]
